_publications._publicationTitle: Nested pediatric low-grade glioma cerebral organoid avatars reveal glutamatergic neuron stromal growth dependency.

_contextSnippet: These PA cells were not 100% RFP positive, as they purposely did not undergo antibiotic (e.g., puromycin) selection in order to preserve some of the PA cell population heterogeneity
details: PA cells were not 100% RFP positive as they purposely did not undergo antibiotic selection to preserve population heterogeneity
